details.test: Task 1: Renew membership at Standard Professional with auto-renew and total <= $500
Task 2: Register for cheapest 3-CPE live business tax webinar next month
Task 3: Add ethics and state-specific on-demand courses to learning plan (>=4 credits, each under $100)
Task 4: Bookmark three recent IRS enforcement update articles (last 90 days)
Task 5: Configure notification preferences (email event reminders only, in-portal forum replies only, others off)
Task 6: Post new question in Small Firm Practice Management forum and subscribe to replies
Task 7: Add three practice templates to favorites and verify My Favorites
Task 8: Update member profile with specialties, licensed states, experience >=5, and directory visibility enabled
Task 9: Select professional liability offer with >=$1M coverage under $800/year
